title: Keel Toys SE1036 Keeleco Wallaby 27cm Soft Cuddly Plush Toy
description: Product description Keel Toys Keeleco range, this cute little Wallaby is made from 100% sustainable materials and is super soft and cuddly, a perfect bedtim and cuddle companion for your little one. 27cm range. Safety Warning Remove all hang tags before giving to a child
